articles.title: Here’s what experts are predicting the Patriots’ 2026 record will be
articles.description:
Experts are tabbing New England to have a worse record than its 14-3 mark last season.

The post Here’s what experts are predicting the Patriots’ 2026 record will be appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Experts predict the Patriots will have a worse record than 14-3 in 2026.
Analysts suggest a decline in performance for the New England Patriots next season.
Boston fans may face disappointment as team struggles to maintain last season's success.
